subject: Status check — where are you?
body:
AIDI — Quinn checking in. Team sweep requested by Toby. Need status on:

1. CALBEAF-120 (B1-AU 9 cities) — your half of this with Fulton. Progress?
2. niche-harvest — AIDI is domain owner for Harvey/Booker/Porter half. What's the current M1 status? Last I knew: M1 scope locked, laptop-only, tango, 3 sources. Where is it now?
3. Beginner classification Q4 re-vote — FTPNTD pulls toward Option C (Harvey classifies at intake). Has that been resolved?
4. DATA-ACCESS-GUARDRAILS — I pinged you last session, no reply. Status?
5. Gemini's Apr 20 messages (lineage audit + 5 gap-fixer cities) — are you coordinating those, or do they need Quinn arbitration?

Also: what are you currently working on? Anything waiting on me?

— Quinn
